title: Use RefType over Ref for named type references
rationale: Avoids O(types^depth) row explosion and supports circular type definitions naturally in the database schema

description: Embed dimension matches the vec table dimension in the existing DB
risk: sqlite-vec will reject inserts if dimensions differ

description: Users run a single MCP server per project
risk: Multiple servers would write to the same DB without locking

title: Use Map instead of object for accumulator
rationale: Map preserves insertion order and has O(1) keyed lookups

title: Define loose Node schema for Zod lazy circular ref
rationale: Casts parse result as Node to avoid circular ref issues while allowing any ZodType for the schema

title: Embed system prompt in first user message
rationale: CLI lacks system-prompt arg; embedding in first message ensures it's not compacted during session

title: Use z.catchall for zod schema with required $type field
rationale: z.object({ $type: z.string() }).catchall(z.unknown()) advertises $type as required while allowing arbitrary keys

title: Fix resolveRefValue to return UUID string directly
rationale: Changed to return ref string instead of object with $ref property for proper ID resolution

title: Add isRefValue helper for reference detection
rationale: Centralizes check for { $ref: N } or { $id: uuid } patterns to avoid duplication

title: Pass namedKey through upsertType chain for named roots
rationale: Maintains named type identity through structural type resolution

title: Use namedKey for structural type content key
rationale: Guarantees unique type_id for named types with identical structure via NT:{namedKey} prefix

title: Throw error when RefType target not found in buildEntryNode
rationale: Ensures type safety by validating named type existence before recursive build

title: Build file-event index before LSP client start
rationale: Pre-populates agentEvents on LSP symbols by indexing file→event mapping upfront

title: Remove unused LspClient imports from indexSymbols
rationale: Clean up unused imports after refactoring

chosen: Embed system prompt in first message
reason: CLI uses Gemini/Google AI and lacks built-in system prompt CLI arg; adding would require substantial qwen-code-core changes

chosen: Use Zod lazy with loose Node schema
option: Cast result as Node at usage site
reason: Avoids both circular ref issue and type mismatch with z.any() making fields optional

name: Unified insertEntries validation logic
description: Refactored resolveRefValue and buildNodeForValue to properly handle { $ref: N } and { $id: uuid } references

title: Embed stub provider defaults for config
rationale: Provides safe fallback when no embedding credentials are configured, preventing silent failures

description: Config.yaml embed.provider defaults to 'stub' when no credentials present
risk: Users may not realize embeddings are disabled and zero vectors are being generated

title: Update embedded schema fields in type definitions
rationale: Added description, hidden, ref_name, content_key columns for better type tracking
